result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage resource.

Usage:
  windows-group [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  config    Manage resource.
  schema    Retrieve resource JSON schema.
  manifest  Retrieve resource manifest.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage resource.

Usage:
  windows-group config [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  get     Retrieve resource configuration.
  set     Set resource configuration.
  test    Test resource configuration.
  delete  Delete resource configuration.
  export  Export resource configuration.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Delete resource configuration.

Usage:
  windows-group config delete [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)  The file JSON input.
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information
